title: Prem Patra
writer: Nitan Bhattacharya, Salil Choudhury, Rajendra Krishan
actors: Sadhana Shivdasani, Shashi Kapoor, Seema Deo
plot: While studying in medical college Arun Kumar Mathur (Shashi Kapoor) has a misunderstanding over a love letter with Kavita Kapoor (Sadhana), and must leave the college, much to his dismay. Kavita later finds out that it was not Aru...
